questions.question:
Persistent storage for an application in namespace `storage-lab` is not binding correctly.

A PersistentVolume `app-data-pv`, a PersistentVolumeClaim `app-data`, and a Deployment `reporting-app` already exist.

Diagnose and fix the storage configuration so that:
- `app-data` is bound successfully
- `reporting-app` becomes Available
- the application Pod mounts the claim at `/data`

Do not recreate the application Deployment unless it is strictly required to apply the corrected storage configuration.

verification.description: reporting-app is Available and mounts the claim at /data
Storage fix preserves the intended PV/PVC relationship without orphaning resources
